title: Senior Frontend Developer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BankBazaar Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
